name: io.github.daedalusdevelopmentgroup/ddg-agent-services-mcp
title: DDG Agent Services
description: Pay-per-call x402 gateway: agent tools, OpenAI-compatible LLM, market data, RPC, security audits.

environmentVariables.name: DDG_AGENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Stable agent identifier for free-trial + usage tracking (optional).

environmentVariables.name: DDG_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: EVM (Base) wallet private key used to auto-pay x402 on paid routes (optional; free/free-trial routes need no wallet).
